title: Remote Host Support + Session Adoption
description:
## Overview
First-class remote host management for Agent Deck. Implements --host flag, session adopt, TUI integration, and remote tmux helpers.

## Status
Waves 1-2 complete (config, SSH socket, host probing, host CLI). Waves 3-4 remain.

## Success Criteria
- [ ] agent-deck add --host <name> creates remote sessions
- [ ] agent-deck add --host auto picks least-loaded host
- [ ] agent-deck session adopt brings remote tmux sessions into dashboard
- [ ] TUI shows remote indicator, correct delete dialog, blocks fork/restart for adopted
- [ ] TUI host picker in new session dialog
- [ ] All tests pass, go build/vet clean

## Out of Scope
- Remote agent-deck orchestration (existing [remotes])
- Remote path autocomplete
- SSH key management

title: Add --host flag to add and launch commands
description:
## Description
Add --host flag to handleAdd() and handleLaunch() for creating sessions on configured remote hosts.

## Design
- Add flags: --host (string: host name or 'auto'), --dry-run (bool: show selection without creating)
- --host auto: call SelectBestHost(), print selection to stderr
- --host <name>: look up config.Hosts[name], error if not found
- --dry-run: print selection matrix and exit
- Set inst.SSHHost = hostConfig.SSHHost, inst.SSHRemotePath = hostConfig.DefaultPath
- Store inst.HostName = name for display
- --host and --ssh mutually exclusive
- --host and --sandbox mutually exclusive

## Out of Scope
- TUI host picker (separate task)
- Session adoption

## Risk
Low — extends existing flag parsing, uses established SSHHost field.

## Definition of Ready
- [x] HostConfig in UserConfig (done)
- [x] ProbeAllHosts/SelectBestHost available (done)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] agent-deck add --host beelink -c claude creates remote session
- [ ] agent-deck add --host auto picks least-loaded host
- [ ] agent-deck add --host auto --dry-run shows matrix, no session
- [ ] agent-deck launch --host beelink -c claude works
- [ ] --host + --ssh errors
- [ ] --host + --sandbox errors
- [ ] --host nonexistent errors with clear message

## Dependencies
Blocked by: none (prereqs already complete)
Blocks: none

## Verification Gates
- [ ] go build ./...
- [ ] go vet ./...

## Definition of Done
- [ ] --host flag works on both add and launch
- [ ] Auto-selection works with dry-run

## File Scope
ALLOWED: cmd/agent-deck/main.go (handleAdd), cmd/agent-deck/launch_cmd.go (handleLaunch)
FORBIDDEN: internal/ui/, internal/session/hostprobe.go

## Estimate
~30 minutes

title: Remote tmux helpers
description:
## Description
Add remote tmux helper functions to internal/tmux/tmux.go.

## Design
- ListRemoteSessions(sshHost string) ([]string, error) — ssh <host> tmux list-sessions -F '#{session_name}'
- CaptureRemotePane(sshHost, session string) (string, error) — ssh <host> tmux capture-pane -p -t <session>
- ListNonAgentDeckSessions() ([]string, error) — local sessions NOT prefixed with agentdeck_
- Use sshSocketDir()/sshControlPathPattern() from session package for SSH ControlPath

## Out of Scope
- Remote session creation
- ANSI stripping (done in session package)

## Risk
None — additive helper functions.

## Definition of Ready
- [x] sshSocketDir available (done)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All three functions implemented
- [ ] ListNonAgentDeckSessions filters correctly
- [ ] go build ./... passes
- [ ] Unit test for ListNonAgentDeckSessions filtering

## Dependencies
Blocked by: none (prereqs complete)
Blocks: claude-deck-3tl.3 (session adopt)

## Verification Gates
- [ ] go build ./...
- [ ] go test ./internal/tmux/ -run TestListNonAgentDeck

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Remote tmux helpers available for session adopt

## File Scope
ALLOWED: internal/tmux/tmux.go, internal/tmux/tmux_test.go
FORBIDDEN: internal/session/, cmd/agent-deck/, internal/ui/

## Estimate
~20 minutes

title: Session adopt command
description:
## Description
Add 'session adopt' subcommand to bring existing remote tmux sessions into the Agent Deck dashboard.

## Design
- Add 'adopt' case to handleSession() dispatcher in session_cmd.go
- Flags: --host <name>, --title <name>, --path <dir>, --tool <tool>, --group <group>, --json
- Flow: resolve host -> verify remote session (ssh tmux has-session) -> check duplicate adoption -> detect CWD -> suppress remote status bar -> create instance -> build SSH attach command -> inst.Start() -> save
- Instance fields: Adopted bool, AdoptedTmuxName string, AdoptedSSHHost string (separate from SSHHost to prevent wrapForSSH double-wrapping)
- Remote status detection: override capture-pane to run via SSH, strip ANSI/OSC escapes
- stripANSI regex: \x1b\[[0-9;]*[a-zA-Z]|\x1b\][^\x07]*\x07|\x1b\(B
- Add adopted fields to InstanceData, toolDataBlob (backward compatible JSON blob)

## Out of Scope
- TUI visual indicators (separate task)
- Fork/restart blocking (separate task)

## Risk
Medium — new adoption flow needs careful handling of double-SSH wrapping.

## Definition of Ready
- [x] HostConfig in UserConfig (done)
- [ ] Remote tmux helpers available (claude-deck-3tl.2)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] agent-deck session adopt <name> --host <host> works
- [ ] Duplicate adoption rejected
- [ ] Remote session verified before adoption
- [ ] CWD auto-detected from remote pane
- [ ] Adopted sessions stored with correct fields in storage + statedb
- [ ] IsSSH() returns false for adopted sessions (prevents double wrap)
- [ ] stripANSI removes escape sequences
- [ ] Unit tests for stripANSI, NewAdoptedInstance, serialization round-trip

## Dependencies
Blocked by: claude-deck-3tl.2 (remote tmux helpers)
Blocks: claude-deck-3tl.4, claude-deck-3tl.6

## Verification Gates
- [ ] go build ./...
- [ ] go vet ./...
- [ ] go test ./internal/session/ -run TestStripANSI
- [ ] go test ./internal/session/ -run TestAdopted

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Adoption flow works end-to-end
- [ ] Fields persisted correctly in storage + statedb

## File Scope
ALLOWED: cmd/agent-deck/session_cmd.go, internal/session/instance.go, internal/session/storage.go, internal/statedb/migrate.go, internal/tmux/tmux.go
FORBIDDEN: internal/ui/

## Estimate
~60 minutes

title: TUI remote indicator and delete dialog
description:
## Description
Add visual remote/adopted indicator in session list and branch delete confirmation for adopted sessions.

## Design
- In home.go session rendering: add up-right arrow before title when inst.IsSSH() || inst.Adopted
- In ConfirmDeleteSession: branch on inst.Adopted — 'The local reference will be removed. The remote tmux session stays alive.' vs normal
- When deleting adopted session: only kill local proxy tmux, NOT remote session

## Out of Scope
- Host picker in new dialog (separate task)
- Fork/restart blocking (separate task)

## Definition of Ready
- [ ] Adopted field exists on Instance (claude-deck-3tl.3)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Remote sessions show visual indicator in TUI list
- [ ] Adopted sessions show different delete confirmation text
- [ ] Deleting adopted session preserves remote tmux session

## Dependencies
Blocked by: claude-deck-3tl.3
Blocks: none

## Verification Gates
- [ ] go build ./...
- [ ] Manual QA: verify indicator displays

## File Scope
ALLOWED: internal/ui/home.go
FORBIDDEN: internal/session/, cmd/agent-deck/

## Estimate
~30 minutes

title: TUI host picker in new session dialog
description:
## Description
Add host selection field to the new session dialog with cycle picker.

## Design
- Add focusHost target to dialog focus cycle
- Left/right cycle: ["local", "auto", hostnames from config.Hosts...]
- Mutually exclusive with sandbox toggle
- When host selected: set SSHHost from config, use DefaultPath

## Out of Scope
- Remote path autocomplete
- Host metrics display in picker

## Definition of Ready
- [x] HostConfig in UserConfig (done)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Host picker appears in new session dialog
- [ ] Cycle through local/auto/configured hosts
- [ ] Mutually exclusive with sandbox
- [ ] Created session uses correct SSHHost and remote path

## Dependencies
Blocked by: none (prereqs complete)
Blocks: none

## Verification Gates
- [ ] go build ./...
- [ ] Manual QA: open dialog, cycle hosts, create session

## File Scope
ALLOWED: internal/ui/newdialog.go
FORBIDDEN: internal/session/, cmd/agent-deck/

## Estimate
~30 minutes

title: Block fork and restart for adopted sessions
description: When inst.Adopted is true: disable/hide fork action (remote paths don't exist locally), block restart with error 'Restart not supported for adopted sessions. Delete and re-adopt instead.' Files: internal/ui/home.go (fork and restart handlers). Blocked by: claude-deck-3tl.3 (needs Adopted field on Instance). Verification: attempt fork on adopted session → blocked with message; attempt restart → blocked with message. Definition of Done: both actions show appropriate error/disabled state for adopted sessions.

title: Fix rate limit sliding window logic in health monitor
description: pool_simple.go ~line 300: Rate limit checks lastRestart timing but doesn't use a proper sliding window. Can allow bursts of restarts if they happen to fall on opposite sides of the time boundary. Also consider lowering maxTotalRestartFailures from 10 to 5.

title: perf: add eviction limits to host probe cache
description: The global hostProbeCache in internal/session/hostprobe.go has no bounds. Add max entries with LRU eviction or TTL-based cleanup to prevent unbounded memory growth when users add many hosts.
close_reason: Implemented bounded host probe cache with eviction and tests

title: [P1-FIXED] Rename max function to avoid Go 1.21+ built-in shadowing
description: In internal/session/hostprobe.go:266, the 'max' function shadows Go 1.21+ built-in. Fixed by renaming to maxFloat64. This bead tracks the fix for posterity.

title: Add manual reset for permanently failed MCPs
description: When an MCP hits maxTotalRestartFailures, it's permanently marked as failed with no way to reset without restarting agent-deck. Add a TUI action or CLI command to manually reset a failed MCP's failure counter and trigger a fresh start attempt.

title: [P2] Evaluate consolidating redundant switch branches in mapClaudeSDKMessageTypeToStatus
description: In internal/session/claude_sdk_bridge.go:239-274, the function has two switches that handle overlapping cases. The first switch (lines 239-251) handles exact matches, while the second (lines 253-274) handles fuzzy/partial matches. Consider whether both are needed or if consolidation would improve clarity. Decision: Keep both - the second switch serves as a fuzzy fallback for future message types.

title: Agent-Deck Development
description: Ongoing development and improvements to agent-deck terminal session manager for AI coding agents

title: MCP Pool improvements
description: Improvements to internal/mcppool/pool_simple.go - MCP connection pooling

title: Session pool manager updates
description: Updates to internal/session/pool_manager.go - session management improvements

title: UI improvements
description: Updates to internal/ui/home.go and confirm_dialog.go - TUI improvements

title: feat: make overload threshold configurable
description: Move defaultOverloadThreshold (80.0) and probeCacheTTL (30s) constants in hostprobe.go to config.toml for power users. Add [remote] section with overload_threshold and probe_cache_ttl options.
close_reason: Added configurable remote overload threshold and probe cache TTL with validation and tests

title: Add Setpgid to kill grandchild MCP processes (npx/uvx)
description: socket_proxy.go line 158: exec.Cmd doesn't set SysProcAttr.Setpgid=true. When npx/uvx spawns grandchild processes, killing the parent doesn't kill the tree. Fix: set Setpgid=true on Start(), then use syscall.Kill(-pid, SIGTERM) in Stop(). This is the root cause of the Playwright CPU leak incident. Claude Code has open P0 bugs for the same issue (#1935, #15945).
close_reason: Fixed in socket_proxy.go: added Setpgid=true and Kill(-pid) for process group cleanup

title: Clean up stale external socket files on startup
description: When agent-deck discovers external sockets (isSocketAlive in socket_proxy.go), it reuses them. But if the owning instance crashes, these sockets become stale and are never cleaned up. On startup, check all /tmp/agentdeck-mcp-*.sock files and remove ones where isSocketAlive returns false.

title: Hybrid status detection: WebSocket NDJSON protocol for Claude Code sessions
description:
Investigate using Claude Code's hidden --sdk-url WebSocket flag for perfect status detection in Claude sessions.

## Context
The Vibe Company's 'companion' repo (github.com/The-Vibe-Company/companion) reverse-engineered Claude Code's NDJSON WebSocket protocol. This gives protocol-driven status detection (running/idle/waiting/error) with zero polling and zero regex.

## Key Constraint
--sdk-url disables Claude's TUI entirely (headless mode). Cannot have both WebSocket AND interactive terminal from the same Claude process. Requires a different architecture.

## Recommended Approach: SDK Mode as Optional Session Type
- Add config option: [claude] sdk_mode = true (default: false)
- When enabled, Claude runs headless via --sdk-url pointing to embedded Go WebSocket server
- Agent-deck renders conversation into tmux pane (custom renderer)
- Status detection becomes perfect (protocol-driven, no regex)
- Also gets: cost tracking, token counts, context %, tool call visibility

## Injection Points
- buildClaudeExtraFlags() at instance.go:420
- buildClaudeResumeCommand() at instance.go:2586
- ClaudeOptions struct in tooloptions.go
- ClaudeSettings struct in userconfig.go

## What to Build
1. Go WebSocket server (~200-300 lines, embedded in agent-deck)
2. NDJSON parser (5 message types: system/init, assistant, result, control_request, keep_alive)
3. Status state machine (maps to existing GREEN/YELLOW/GRAY/RED)
4. tmux pane renderer (format SDK messages for terminal display)
5. Input capture (route user keystrokes to WebSocket user messages)
6. Permission handler (auto-approve in dangerous mode)

## Risk
--sdk-url is hidden/undocumented. Anthropic could change or remove it. Feature must be opt-in with fallback to normal tmux mode.

## Reference
Protocol spec: WEBSOCKET_PROTOCOL_REVERSED.md in companion repo
Companion repo: github.com/The-Vibe-Company/companion (MIT license, 775 stars)

title: security: add config file permission check on startup
description: On startup, check that ~/.agent-deck/config.toml has restrictive permissions (0600 recommended). Warn user if world-readable since it contains SSH host configurations.
close_reason: Added startup warning for permissive config.toml permissions with tests

title: Add MCP-level ping health check for stuck servers
description: socket_proxy.go HealthCheck() (line 451) only checks Signal(0) + socket file exists. Doesn't catch stuck/frozen MCP servers. Fix: send a JSON-RPC ping request through the socket and verify response within 5s timeout. MCP spec explicitly supports ping method. Claude Code had a 16-hour hang (issue #15945) from this exact gap.

title: Use sync.Pool for scanner buffers to reduce memory ~70%
description: socket_proxy.go lines 273, 295: Each client connection allocates a 10MB scanner buffer (64KB initial + 10MB max). With 100 max clients per proxy, worst case is 1GB per MCP. Fix: use sync.Pool to share buffers across connections, and consider lazy allocation (start at 64KB, grow only if needed). Most MCP messages are <100KB.

title: security: validate SSH host format in hostprobe
description: Validate SSH host format from config to prevent injection if config.toml is compromised. Add validation to reject shell metacharacters in SSHHost field. Document that config.toml should have 0600 permissions.
close_reason: Implemented: SSH host format validation on config load + tests

title: [P1-DOCUMENTED] Document permissive CORS decision for WebSocket bridge
description: In internal/session/claude_sdk_bridge.go:65, CheckOrigin returns true for all requests. This is acceptable because the bridge binds to 127.0.0.1 only (not exposed to external networks). Added defense-in-depth comment documenting this intentional design decision.

title: docs: add security model doc for remote sessions
description: Document the security model for remote sessions: localhost-only services, SSH control socket security, config file protection requirements, and threat model for remote adoption.
close_reason: Added remote session security model documentation and README link

title: [P3-FIXED] Mark unused profile parameter in handleHost
description: In cmd/agent-deck/host_cmd.go:15, handleHost(profile string, args []string) receives profile but doesn't use it. Already handled with '_ = profile' on line 16 to silence the compiler. Consider removing the parameter if truly unused, or document why it's kept for future use.
